metadata.title: Manufacturing Software Development Services by Brilworks | Brilworks
metadata.description: Custom manufacturing software for SMBs: order management, inventory, shop floor apps, MES, and warehouse tools, built by a team with deep production-domain experience.
metadata.ogTitle: Manufacturing Software Development Services by Brilworks
metadata.ogDescription: Custom manufacturing software for SMBs: order management, inventory, shop floor apps, MES, and warehouse tools, built by a team with deep production-domain experience.

hero.headline: Custom Manufacturing Software Development
hero.subheadline: Custom software for production companies. We build order management systems, inventory tracking, shop floor applications, and integrations that connect your existing tools.

items.description: We've spent 8 years building software for businesses that make physical products.  We work with SME manufacturers who've outgrown spreadsheets but don't need (or want) a massive enterprise system. Our developers have delivered over 120 projects with a 98% success rate. We're rated as top developers because we listen first, then build what actually solves the problem.

items.title: Order Management Platforms
items.description: Track customer orders from quote to delivery, with automatic production scheduling and material allocation.

items.title: Inventory Tracking Systems
items.description: Real-time stock levels across multiple locations, with barcode scanning and automated reorder alerts.

items.title: Shop Floor Applications
items.description: Digital work instructions, machine monitoring, production counts, and downtime tracking captured in real-time.

items.title: Quality Control Software
items.description: Digital inspection checklists, defect tracking, non-conformance management, and statistical process control.

items.title: Mobile Apps for Production
items.description: Native iOS and Android apps that work offline for warehouse operations, job tracking, and inspections.

sections.title: Digital Tools We Build for Manufacturers

items.title: Manufacturing Execution Systems (MES)
items.description: Connect machines and operators to capture production data, monitor OEE, and identify bottlenecks.

items.title: Custom Web Dashboards
items.description: Browser-based reporting and management interfaces accessible from any device.

items.title: Warehouse Management Solutions
items.description: Receiving, putaway, picking, and shipping workflows with lot and serial number traceability.

items.title: Production Planning Tools
items.description: Schedule production runs, calculate material requirements, and manage capacity across your facility.

sections.title: Ready to Build Your Manufacturing App?
sections.subtitle: Get a free consultation and project estimate. We respond within 24 hours.

items.title: Time & Material
items.description: Pay for the hours we work. Good for projects where requirements will evolve as you learn what works.

items.title: Fixed Cost
items.description: One price for defined deliverables. We estimate the work, agree on what you'll get, and deliver it for that budget.

items.title: Staff Augmentation
items.description: Our developers join your team and work your hours using your tools and processes.

items.title: Dedicated Development Team
items.description: A full team focused exclusively on your project, including developers, designers, QA testers, and a project manager.

items.title: Top-Rated Developers
items.description: Our team members consistently earn top ratings for their technical skills and communication.

items.title: Manufacturing Experience
items.description: We've built software for brick manufacturers, seat makers, and other production companies.

items.title: Agile & Transparent
items.description: You see progress regularly through sprints and working software, not after months of silence.

items.title: Clear Communication
items.description: We explain technical decisions in plain language without overwhelming you with jargon.

items.title: Post-Launch Support
items.description: We provide training, fix bugs, make adjustments, and add features as your needs evolve.

sections.title: Work That Speaks For Itself
sections.subtitle: Because Seeing is Believing
